MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-14-2015 Vacated

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And (Proposed) Consent Judgment As To Defts Starz Media, Llc And Anchor Bay Entertainment Llc
Off Calendar Nov-20-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF ANTHONY HELD'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement, And Proposed Consent Judgment As To Defendants Starz Media, LLC, and Anchor Bay Entertainment LLC is Granted. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/ehg

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And (Proposed) Consent Judgment As To Defts Starz Media, Llc And Anchor Bay Entertainment Llc
Off Calendar Nov-04-2014 Continued To Nov-20-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. RACHEL SATER OF MOSCONE EMBLIDGE SATER AND OTIS, TEL. NO. 362-3599 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. AMY LALLY OF SIDLEY AUSTIN LLP, TEL. NO. (213)896-6000 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED REGARDING THE ISSUES RAISED BY THE COURT. PLAINTIFF ANTHONY HELD's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And (Proposed) Consent Judgment As To Defendants Starz Media, Llc And Anchor Bay Entertainment Llc IS CONTINUED TO NOVEMBER 20, 2014 FOR THE PETITIONER TO SUBMIT CONTEMPORANEOUS TIME RECORDS. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/EHG)
